title: Peruvian Serrano Ham Tagine
description: A fusion of Peruvian and Middle Eastern flavors, this dish is a unique take on traditional tagines. The combination of serrano peppers and ham adds a spicy kick.
instructions: In a large Dutch oven, heat 2 tbsp of oil over medium heat.
Add the sliced onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the sliced ham and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the serrano peppers, citrus zest, and tagine spice blend. Cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Transfer the Dutch oven to the preheated oven and cook for 20 minutes.
Glaze the ham with the jelly during the last 5 minutes of cooking.
Remove from the oven and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
